alternatives.transcript: I don't wanna write this down, I don't wanna tell you how I feel right now I don't wanna take no time to write this down Don't wanna tell you how I feel right now Hey, tomorrow may never come For you or me, life is not promised Tomorrow may never show up For you and me, this life is not promised I ain't no perfect man I'm trying to do the best that I can With what it is I have I ain't no perfect man I'm trying to do the best that I can with all the things I have I ain't no perfect man, I'm trying to do the best that I can with all the things I have Put my heart and soul into this song I hope you feel me From where I am to wherever you are I mean that sincerely Tomorrow may never come Before you and me, life is like a promise Tomorrow may never appear You better hold this very moment Very close to you So close to you so close to you Don't be afraid to let it shine My Umi said shine your light on the world, shine your light for the world to see My Umi said shine your light on the world, shine your light for the world to see Sometimes I get discouraged, look around and things are so weak, people are so weak Sometimes, sometimes I get like mine Sometimes my heart gets heavy, Sometimes I just wanna leave it Flutter away Sometimes I don't know what to do with myself Passion takes over me Feel like a man going insane Lose my brain trying to maintain Hey, hey, hey, hey Put my heart and soul into this yard Hope you feel me where I am So where can we be all? Sometimes I don't want to be a father, sometimes I just want a quiet life Me and my baby, me and my lady Sometimes I don't want to get in the snow ball, sometimes I don't want to be a soldier Sometimes I just want to be a man, but Who me say shine your light on the world? Shine your light for the world to see

paragraphs.transcript:
I don't wanna write this down, I don't wanna tell you how I feel right now I don't wanna take no time to write this down Don't wanna tell you how I feel right now Hey, tomorrow may never come For you or me, life is not promised Tomorrow may never show up For you and me, this life is not promised I ain't no perfect man I'm trying to do the best that I can With what it is I have I ain't no perfect man I'm trying to do the best that I can with all the things I have I ain't no perfect man, I'm trying to do the best that I can with all the things I have Put my heart and soul into this song I hope you feel me From where I am to wherever you are I mean that sincerely Tomorrow may never come Before you and me, life is like a promise Tomorrow may never appear You better hold this very moment Very close to you So close to you so close to you Don't be afraid to let it shine My Umi said shine your light on the world, shine your light for the world to see My Umi said shine your light on the world, shine your light for the world to see Sometimes I get discouraged, look around and things are so weak, people are so weak Sometimes, sometimes I get like mine Sometimes my heart gets heavy, Sometimes I just wanna leave it Flutter away Sometimes I don't know what to do with myself Passion takes over me Feel like a man going insane Lose my brain trying to maintain Hey, hey, hey, hey Put my heart and soul into this yard Hope you feel me where I am So where can we be all?

Sometimes I don't want to be a father, sometimes I just want a quiet life Me and my baby, me and my lady Sometimes I don't want to get in the snow ball, sometimes I don't want to be a soldier Sometimes I just want to be a man, but Who me say shine your light on the world? Shine your light for the world to see
